text.title: shadcn-ui Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for shadcn-ui as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents rewrite components/ui/button.tsx to "improve" it — adding features, adjusting styles.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ui/ is vendored. Edits are overwritten on the next shadcn add --overwrite. Lock the directory in CODEOWNERS and add a CI guard that rejects unallowlisted edits to ui/.

failure-mode.description: Agents write hex values into globals.css (--primary: #2563eb) instead of HSL triplets.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tailwind's opacity modifier syntax (bg-primary/90) requires bare HSL triplets. Hex values break alpha helpers silently — the color renders but transparency does not work.

failure-mode.description: Agents add shadcn components to Next.js RSC files without checking for "use client".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Most shadcn components use React hooks and require a client boundary. Missing "use client" causes a hydration error that reports as an unrelated ReactCurrentDispatcher error.

failure-mode.description: Agents use the deprecated shadcn-ui package name (npx shadcn-ui@latest) instead of shadcn.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The CLI was renamed to shadcn. Training data before the rename uses the old name. Pin the current CLI name in any prompt or scaffold script agents read.
